question: The chart shows approval rating trend over time (out of a possible 0–100%). What is the most appropriate conclusion from the changes shown?

options.A: The approval rating fluctuated only slightly over the period
options.B: The trend cannot be determined from this chart
options.C: There was a dramatic improvement in approval rating
options.D: The approval rating stayed exactly the same every year

explanation: The y-axis uses a very tight range (77.63–78.00%) instead of a more informative 0–100% context, which visually exaggerates variability. The actual net change is about 0.26% over the period, which is modest in the full context.
